Thanks!

First Annual CGEC Alpha Project Retreat
November 21-23, 2003

The Center for Genomic Experimentation and Computation (CGEC) is supported by a grant from:

The NIH National Human Genome Research Institute


The CGEC and the Molecular Sciences Institute would also like to thank the following individuals and groups for their assistance during the planning and execution of the Retreat:

Ms. Dawn Warfield
Creator of the "The Shmoo Posse" image

Mrs. Carolyn Key Raney
Logistics

Costanoa Coastal Lodge and Camp
Extraordinary service and hospitality
